name: supabase-upgrade-migration
description: Upgrade Supabase SDK and CLI versions with breaking-change detection and automated code migration. Use when upgrading @supabase/supabase-js (v1→v2 or minor bumps), migrating auth/realtime/storage APIs, or updating the Supabase CLI. Trigger with phrases like "upgrade supabase", "supabase breaking changes", "migrate supabase v2", "update supabase SDK".
